description: Canonical aspirin VerifiedReport with real Cochrane source + 1 verified sentence. Bundle should pack manifest + signature + content; SHA256 anchors must match content bytes.
source_full_text: The randomized trial enrolled 1247 adults with chronic migraines. Aspirin 1000 mg demonstrated significant headache reduction at 52% response rate vs 34% placebo (P<.001). Adverse events were minimal at 8% incidence.
source_title: Aspirin for acute migraine in adults
verified_sentence_text: The 2-hour headache response rate was 52% with aspirin versus 34% with placebo (P<.001) [#ev:src-cochrane-aspirin:0-186].
